base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_inventory_grid_dungeon — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 legend of zelda. Dungeon-only pause menu — shows dungeon map + compass indicator + current-room marker. Blue-checker map rendering. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dungeon-only pause menu — shows dungeon map + compass indicator + current-room marker. Blue-checker map rendering
